center.name: Chester Zoo
center.summary: Chester Zoo is a zoo in Upton-by-Chester, Cheshire, England.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: right|thumb|At Chester Zoo The lilacine amazon (Amazona lilacina), also known as the Ecuadorian red-lored amazon, is an amazon parrot native to Ecuador in South America
